## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Timothé's potential role as Managing Director SEO at Growth X and explore company structure, culture, and growth plans.](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X is experiencing rapid growth, scaling from 15 to 35 clients and $1M to $6M ARR in 4 months](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [The company uses AI-driven workflows to deliver high-value marketing services, positioning itself as a tech-enabled service rather than a traditional agency](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Growth X is actively hiring (70+ roles planned) and evolving its structure, with challenges in maintaining high talent standards during rapid expansion](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [The Managing Director SEO role would involve overseeing 2-3 pods, each containing 4-5 client accounts, and providing strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

## Topics

### Growth X's Business Model and Rapid Growth

  - [Positioned as a tech-enabled service company, not a traditional agency](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Leveraging AI and automation to deliver marketing services efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Grown from 15 to 35 clients and $1M to $6M ARR in 4 months](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Closing deals rapidly, often after just one sales call](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Profitable margins due to AI-driven approach, attracting investor interest](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### Company Structure and Roles

  - [Recently shifted to a pod structure for scalability and career growth](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Typical pod: 1 pod lead (managing editor), 1-2 account managers, 1-2 supporting roles](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Managing Directors oversee 2-3 pods (8-15 client accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Hiring for various roles including copywriters, editors, and support staff](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Considering future structure changes to enable pods to handle more accounts (e.g., 8 instead of 5)](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

### Hiring Process and Talent Management

  - [Using AI-driven evaluation of applications and video interviews](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Automated initial screening to handle high application volumes](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Concerns about maintaining talent quality during rapid hiring (70+ roles planned)](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Focus on creating career growth paths within the company](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

### Managing Director SEO Role

  - [Oversee 2-3 pods (8-15 client accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Ensure pods are functioning well and growing accounts](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Provide strategic guidance and support to pod leads](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Help refine overall philosophy and strategy across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Adapt approaches based on evolving industry trends (e.g., AI content, Google updates)](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)

### Client Interaction and Account Management

  - [Managing Directors and Managing Editors primarily handle client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Considering evolving the model to potentially include higher-level account managers for more client interaction](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Aiming to scale to 100+ accounts by year-end, requiring structural adaptations](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Timothé to review information shared and consider fit with the Managing Director SEO role](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Timothé to send any follow-up questions to Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Potential scheduling of another conversation if needed for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/SzCuUQ4Pgtbkcs1_McQqbYVzefuEuxvr?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
